description: Gold-set eval data for the 8-document Outlook KB classifier. Each case is a realistic user utterance labelled with the expected kb_id (null = out-of-KB, should NOT confidently match). intent: ISSUE | HOW_TO | OFFTOPIC. Hand-authored from kb_meta.json symptoms; deliberately includes confusable pairs (won't-open vs stuck-loading, performance vs crash).
